name: jira-dashboard
description: Jira AI Dashboard — standalone dev mode

scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd frontend && npx next dev -p ${FRONTEND_PORT:-3010}'
scripts.install:all: cd api && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: npm run start:api & npm run start:frontend
scripts.start:frontend: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd frontend && npx next start -p ${FRONTEND_PORT:-3010}'
